chapter_title.en: Evaluating later events by earlier standards

text: ٧٦. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): إِنَّ الْأُمُورَ إذا اشْتَبَهَتْ اعْتُبِرَ آخِرُهَا بِأَوَّلِهَا.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 76. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: If matters get mixed up then the last ones should be appreciated according to the previous one. [1]
